description: For a dark and goth-inspired ensemble, this pair from catwalk is the right choice. Metal links over dark leather overlays riveted to the outsole. Wedge heels cut out in the middle. Wear this with leather skirts, dresses or jackets. Don't forget to throw on hardware accessories.Heels: 4"UpperSynthetic leather upper riveted to the wooden outsoleMetal links on the upper for stylePadded patch on the footbed for comfort to the heelOutsoleTPR outsole referenced from wood with plastic terrace grooved patches on the heel and forefootCutout on the wedge heelSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
